author: DeepSeek — session with paruff
notes: Follows existing VRM scraper pattern (requests + BeautifulSoup).
All currency values are Decimal — never float per AGENTS.md rule 3.
No external API calls from views per AGENTS.md rule 2.
New migration for activation is NON-schema-changing (data-only).

tasks.title: Create FannieMaeHomePathClient scraper
tasks.description: Implement the core scraper in core/integrations/sources/fannie_mae.py. Follows VrmScraper pattern: class-based, requests + BeautifulSoup, configurable delay, normalized dict output.
subtasks: Implement __init__ with delay_seconds from settings.SCRAPER_DELAY_SECONDS
Implement search_by_location(location) -> list[dict]
Implement _fetch_search_page(location, page) internal method
Implement _parse_listing_cards(html) to extract property data from HTML
Normalize output per core/integrations/sources/__init__.py convention
Handle pagination (follow 'Next' links or page params)
Handle HTTP errors (4xx, 5xx, timeout) with logging and graceful abort

acceptance_criteria.criterion: FannieMaeHomePathClient can be instantiated with a custom delay
search_by_location returns a list of dicts with all required normalized fields
HTTP errors are caught and logged, not raised as unhandled exceptions
Empty search results return an empty list, not None
SCRAPER_DELAY_SECONDS setting is read correctly and applied

tasks.title: Create collect_fannie_mae management command
tasks.description: Implement the management command that drives the scraper and upserts results into PipelineProperty records with source_type='fannie'. Supports --location, --request-id, and --all-pending flags.
subtasks: Add --location, --request-id, --all-pending CLI arguments
Resolve target location(s) from args or DiscoveryRequest records
Call FannieMaeHomePathClient.search_by_location() for each target
Upsert each result as PipelineProperty with source_type='fannie' and stage=DISCOVERED
Compute address_hash = sha256(street|city|state) for dedup via unique constraint
Update DiscoveryRequest status to completed with properties_found count
Log summary: location -> X properties found, Y new, Z duplicates skipped
Handle transaction rollback on unrecoverable errors

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Command accepts --location and fetches listings for that location
Command accepts --request-id and fulfills that DiscoveryRequest
Command accepts --all-pending and fulfills all pending Fannie Mae requests
Upserted PipelineProperty has source_type='fannie' and stage=DISCOVERED
Duplicate addresses (same user + source_type + address_hash) are skipped
DiscoveryRequest properties_found is updated after completion

tasks.title: Activate Fannie Mae PropertySource and verify in discovery page
tasks.description: Create a data migration to set PropertySource.is_active=True for the Fannie Mae source. Verify the Property Discovery page shows it as an active integration.
subtasks: Create data migration: PropertySource.objects.filter(source_type='fannie').update(is_active=True)
Verify the Property Discovery page shows Fannie Mae under 'Active' section

acceptance_criteria.criterion: PropertySource with source_type='fannie' has is_active=True after migration
Property Discovery page renders Fannie Mae in the active sources section

tasks.title: Write tests for FannieMaeHomePathClient
tasks.description: Unit tests for the scraper client using fixtures (sample HTML) and mocking (HTTP responses). Tests cover parsing, error handling, rate limiting, and edge cases.
subtasks: Test search_by_location returns correct structure
Test _parse_listing_cards extracts all fields from sample HTML fixture
Test HTTP 404/500 responses are caught gracefully
Test timeout is caught and logged
Test empty results page returns empty list
Test delay is applied between sequential requests
Test pagination follows next page when available

acceptance_criteria.criterion: All unit tests pass with 100% of FannieMaeHomePathClient coverage requirement
Parse test uses real-looking sample HTML, not a trivial stub
Error handling tests cover: 404, 500, timeout, connection error

tasks.title: Write tests for collect_fannie_mae management command
tasks.description: Unit and integration tests for the management command, covering the three CLI modes, upsert logic, dedup, and DiscoveryRequest fulfillment.
subtasks: Test --location creates PipelineProperty records
Test --request-id fulfills the specific DiscoveryRequest
Test --all-pending fulfills multiple DiscoveryRequests
Test duplicate addresses are skipped (same street/city/state)
Test DiscoveryRequest status changes to completed
Test PipelineProperty.source_type = 'fannie'

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Dedup test confirms no duplicate PipelineProperty for same address+user
